reviews.review_text: Incredibly friendly and welcoming team, accommodations and facilities kept neat and clean…would come back any time!

What a beautiful holiday spot! Tropical Hibiscus Caravan Park is an absolute paradise. The vibe is so peaceful, the gardens are stunning, and waking up to wallabies everywhere is magic. The pool is great, the beach is just a short stroll away, and the entire park is spotless.
Keith and Christine are exceptionally welcoming managers who make you feel right at home. Plus, you can't miss the onsite cafe, Alice, Délice, and the crew are lovely, and Alice serves up the most amazing coffee! Highly recommend for a relaxing getaway!

My experiences at the Tropical Hibiscus have been very enjoyable, peaceful, relaxing and positive.  I'm going to be staying there regularly and I know I will always be able to make the most of my times there because the location is just perfect.  1k walk to the glorious beach and crystal clear ocean overlooking Dunk Island.  Great for everyone especially dogs who just love it.  The thoughtful seating areas dotted along the shore give one time to just sit and take it all in. Everything is so handy to the Hibiscus, 2 mins walk to shopping centre with a great well stocked Woolworths.  A great Thai restaurant is also not far and the food is absolutely delicious.  The management and staff of Tropical Hibiscus really run a great outfit, catering for all budgets and maintain the grounds and amenities to a very high standard.  They are very helpful and pleasant indeed.  I'll keep going back. By the way, the cafe has now opened at Tropical Hibiscus caravan park !  Its an absolute hit!!!! Alice sure knows how to keep customers happy and keep coming back.  The coffees are quality and today i had the best spinach and feta triangle ive ever had in my life! The food is tantalisingly prepared and displayed, melt in your mouth pastry 😋 The interior of the cafe is divinely furnished and decorated along with unique artwork and crafts made by all local artisans which are purchasable.  A great place to meet up with friends and other travellers who are so interested to discover more about this beautiful region.

I used to stay here all the time and was satisfied, its been over 12 months since my last visit from Townsville. With new owners making some small changes and a good clean up the place is great. The cabins have received some subtle changes and now with extra parking its great. Christine was friendly and made every thing so easy from check in to check out.
Thanks for making our weekend so easy Christine.
Chris & Kate

Friendly, relaxing, tropical paradise.|Cabins, sites to accommodate a variety of vans, caravans, motorhomes, tents (the big top) would require plenty of notice!!|Cafe onsite good barista coffee and tempting treats.  |A cassowary or two may appear along with a very cute inquisitive wallaby.|Tarzan visits throughout the year for routine ‘wellness’ checkups of the trees.

Christine & family & staff all warm, welcoming and helpful

Facilities, well maintained, and a range of activities for your enjoyment, has it all!

Central location

A great home away from home and family friendly. My toddler had a treat!

Highly recommend!

Probably one of the the best situated of all the Caravan parks in The Mission Beach precinct . Although not beachfront it is only a short 500m walk to the pristine Wongaling Beach, even less to the local   Mission Beach Resort hotel and shopping area. This is our 3rd visit . We find it has one of the best camp kitchens we have come across on our travels, there is also a reading room a small on site gym a swimming pool and recently added is a coffee shop. Our site is well grassed with a concrete slab to use for our annex.
Facilities extremely clean and site well maintained. The service from park staff was excellent. They went above and beyond the help assist us!

Stayed last week. New owners very friendly and helpful. The site is well looked after and facilities clean. Great location prices are very good. I don’t review too often but this deserve a 5*
Highly recommended

Stayed again over Anzac weekend, really enjoyed it, will definitely stay again soon

Super camping tenu par Christine qui a été d’une gentillesse avec nous!
Le camping est convivial, calme et bien situé
Les amneties sont propres et très agréables
On recommande !!!

Christine is a wonderful owner and the place is well maintained, neat and tidy. Location is great as super close to amenities such as woolworths. They have also just opened their onsite coffee shop, perfect for a good Sipping duck coffee .
A great little place to stay with nice clean facilities, the pool is a great size! Quiet park & staff were very friendly.
Small park, easy to get clean ameneties, sympa owners. I recommend this location for its quiet environnent.

Tropical Hibiscus is a little gem of a site: quite small, well situated with great facilities. The kitchen was spotless with several BBQs and other cookers. Showers and laundry area were similarly clean, good wi-fi, there's even a TV room and a gym. A nearby cafe bar restaurant, Woolworths and Mission beach seal the deal.  We didn't quite realise how nice this place was until we went somewhere else ! Plus, Christine, Keith and Ali (?) were lovely.
Tropical Hibiscus Caravan park ticks all the boxes for cleanliness, facilities, value for money with great hosts.

Tropical Hibiscus CP staff & management do the utmost to ensure you feel like family when you come for a sleepover. Amenities are spotless and the environs are manicured like they knew you were coming. They are in a lovely spot near to, but hidden from, food stores, wine sellers and bistro bar. A lovely stroll to the beach is a must. No doubt we'll see you there.
We really enjoyed our stay at the place. The service was pleasant and welcoming, and the place was clean and beautiful.

We stayed in the 4 bedroom cabin and the value was fantastic. The wardrobes in each room were the biggest I've ever seen in a caravan park cabin and all the bedrooms were spacious. The cabin has everything you need. The owners were lovely. The location was great. We wouldn't hesitate to stay here again.

Great caravan park, quiet, with very clean amenities. The camp kitchen has everything you’d need plus a separate TV games room. Lovely owners who are very friendly and helpful. Is dog friendly and very good rates for P&W. Walk to Woolies and beach 5 minutes away.

We stopped here for one night and liked it so much we came back for another. The park is really clean (one of the cleanest we’ve been at yet), the kitchen was spotless and the toilets and shower facilities even more so. The pool was also an awesome spot for chilling out and was also very clean. It’s rare you go into a camp kitchen that is completely kitted out with everything you need. The staff were so lovely and friendly too and made us feel very welcome. If we’re ever back in mission beach we’ll definitely be staying here again! Thanks!
Bonus points: gym included, inside areas with couches & wallaby visits!

This place is fantastic!  Such lovely people who are in charge the service is great The whole place is so well maintained, the facilities are great, the cabin I had last night is sooooo well equipped and comfortable, great verandah area.  The location is so perfect   and the 1k walk to beach is good and the beach is divine!!!!! So close to shops, Woolworths!!!!!! Love it, it's going to become my second home from now on!!!!!!

I recommend this caravan park. The staff are lovely and the facilities are very clean. There is a large kitchen, a big swimming pool, and a gym. If you pass through Mission Beach, don’t hesitate to stop here
Christine and the staff aare super friendly, the amenities are very clean!

Merci à Christine pour son accueil et sa gentillesse !
Lieu emprunt de quiétude et bien entretenu.
Very nice camping, big sites, gym, pool… everything you need. Close to Woolies. And the owners are the nicest people !
Amazing staff, great location

excellent camping ! Bon rapport qualité prix, les nouveaux propriétaires présent depuis un peu moins d’un an son très gentils et très aidant concernant les activités à faire autour de mission beach  ! La piscine est très agréable avec une petite salle de sport pour garder la forme, le coin barbecue était parfait avec 2 gros barbecues de qualité, l’ensemble du camping était parfaitement clean que ce soit les parties communes ainsi que les espaces de toilettes/salles de bain ! merci encore pour l’accueil et bonne continuation !

Der Campingplatz ist einfach nur perfekt. Wir waren für 2 Nächte in der Regensaison da und hatten die unpowered Plätze für uns allein. Die Toiletten und Duschen sind perfekt sauber. Außerdem gibt es einen Pool und ein Gym in denen wir die ganze Zeit alleine waren. Die Küche ist perfekt ausgestattet und super sauber. Außerdem gibt es einen TV-Raum. Die Besitzer sind total liebenswert und haben einem von Anfang ein gutes Gefühlt gegeben. Der Campingplatz liegt direkt neben Woolworths und der Tankstelle ( zu Fuß 4 min). Wir wären gerne länger geblieben. Einfach perfekt :)
Had   6 days at powered site,great peaceful location, clean amenities extremely friendly owners and staff,fantastic pizza night with great music,thanks for a wonderful holiday

My friend and I stopped here on our roadtrip down south. The campsite has everything you need. We made use of the gym and pool which was great. The campsite has great shower facilities which are very clean. The staff are very friendly and helpful. Would highly recommend.
We had a great stay here, hosts are wonderful I would recommend it!

Stayed here as couple in a camper van.
Beautiful camping grounds, the facilities are clean, wide and comfortable. The owner is an amazing, very helpful and welcoming. Recommended!!
What an experience, the park is beautiful and so are the hosts Yorky and Christine. Thank you for the hospitality ❤️🦋🤙🏾

We didn’t get to stay here because I completely messed up my booking. The caravan park was under no obligation to offer any flexibility at all, and yet they did on this occasion, in light of severe weather events. I’ve received an unexpected level of customer service and compassion, which I think would have bode well for a pleasant stay had we made it.

Excellent value for money. We were a group of 6 women sharing for a New Year getaway. We had a 4 bedroom cabin with kitchen, lounge, bathroom and secure covered deck area. The bedroom linen was clean and fresh and the beds themselves were very comfortable. The bathroom was clean and there was plenty of spare toilet paper. Plenty of equipment in the kitchen and a good sized fridge.
Our host was very friendly and helpful and even put on a drinks and nibbles one afternoon for the whole park to welcome the New Year.
The camp kitchen, amenities block and pool were spotless and in good working order.
It was just a short walk to the beach, the local pub, Woolies, BWS and good coffee!
Would recommend, and will stay again! Thanks for having us Christine :)

Parfait endroit pour se reposer. Caravan Park au calme, très bien entretenu et proche de la mer.
La cuisine, les sanitaires et tout l’équipement sur place est propre, fonctionnel et parfait pour se détendre.
Beaucoup de jeux pour enfants. C’est très appréciable.
La piscine est bien entretenue.
Les hôtes sont adorables et le plus, la gérante parle français.

Couldn’t recommend more - owners super helpful and nice.

We visited during wet season. While we were there there was a monsoon trough. The owners were super helpful with the advice and they offered to drive us to the supermarket during biggest downpour.

We got late check out. Room and facilities were clean. Toilets and showers were new/renovated so very modern.

I’m a woman and I travel alone with my car.

I have love this camping. Well organised with everything you need.

The woman who welcomed me was very kind !

Thank you for everything.

We stayed a night recently in a cabin and were really happy with absolutely everything from arrival to departure!! Very friendly, kind and helpful people and very clean and well kept facilities. Great place to stay and we will definitely be back!!

Que dire à part merci à la patronne qui a été d'une grande gentillesse !
Le camping est très fonctionnel et propre, vous pourrez notamment trouvé un bbg dernier cri idéal pour faire cuire de belles pièces de viandes,
Endroit parfait en famille ou entre amis pour aller se reposer !
Deux mots : qualitatif et merci
Je recommande !
Great place to stay ! Really calm, clean, the pool is awsome and the owners really lovely.

Christine is a great manager, always ready with some helpful advice or a helping hand. The room, toilets, showers and camp kitchen are spotless clean. Christine will provide pots and plates etc if you need them. When we are back that way we will 100 percent stay at Tropical hibiscus caravan park

We had such a wonderful stay at Tropical Hibiscus! The owners are absolutely incredible, Christine was so accommodating with our arrival and genuinely made us feel welcome from the moment we got there.

The park has everything you could need: a pool, TV room, gym, and a well-equipped kitchen. The toilets and showers were spotless every time, clearly checked and cleaned regularly. Our room was perfect for what we needed, with air-conditioning and a wardrobe which made the stay even more comfortable.

Even though the owners are new to the property, you can already tell big things are coming. They gave us great advice on local activities, even were so excited for us when we went skydiving, and checked in afterwards to hear how it went! There are plenty of beautiful walks nearby, the beach is just a short distance away, and we even spotted a cassowary on the Kennedy Walk.

Highly recommend staying here, especially with the Greyhound bus stop so close. A fantastic experience overall! 🌴💛
Friendly, wonderful team
Very friendly and helpful staff, amenities are clean, nice campkitchen and the vibe on the campground was pretty relaxed :)

Vi boede her to nætter i en af deres hytter. Det var dejligt rent med fine rene toiletter og bade. Aircondition var også top dollar. Der var gode køkkenfaciliteter, og hvis man mangler pander og gryder samt bestik, så kan man bare spørge om det i receptionen, og man får noget uddelt:) De havde en dejlig pool med bruser og det hele var generelt bare i orden:)
Ontzettend gastvrije en informatieve gastvrouw. We werden op een geweldige manier ontvangen bij deze camping.
Had everything we needed, take your own pots pans plates but kitchen well maintained and clean facilities

We stayed here for 1 night on an unpowered site under the canopy and thought everything was great. Peaceful and shaded and communal areas were super clean! There are no utensils or pans provided in the kitchen but that didn’t bother us.

Brilliant caravan park! Lovely owners, clean amenities, great kitchen and very nice pool. Library next door and beach and shops within walking distance! Cassowary came through the park during our stay! We’ll definitely be back one day!
Great stay at mission beach, Christine was absolutely lovely and they are new owners who will make the campsite even better and better

Nous ne pouvons que recommander ce camping : c’est le meilleur que nous ayons fait depuis Sydney !
Les propriétaires sont adorables, les sanitaires sont d’une propreté irréprochable, et la piscine est vraiment très jolie 😍
Le camping est tenu par de nouveaux propriétaires depuis 12 semaines — bravo à eux !

Very good location. We got fresh bananas for breakfast from the owners garden and they had an incredible taste 😍

Friendly staff and clean facilities also included.

202510
Friendly managers.
Clean grounds and facilities.
Recommend to others and will stay again.

Nous avons passé une superbe semaine dans le camping qui est familial, calme et propose beaucoup de services (piscine, barbecue, plancha, salle télé, salle de sport). Les sanitaires et la cuisine sont très propres, de même pour les emplacements qui sont très bien entretenus.
Merci encore pour votre accueil et votre gentillesse ! Nous reviendrons quand nous repasserons dans les alentours !
Beautiful campsite with a gym, swimming pool, outdoor kitchen, and clean restrooms. Very friendly staff and only 700 meters from one of the most beautiful beaches. I can only recommend it.

Vi havde en fantastisk oplevelse på denne campingplads! Personalet var utroligt søde og hjælpsomme - det gav både forslag til udflugter og hjalp endda med at fylde vores gas-tank. Vi havde store problemer med den, fordi campervanen, vi havde lånt, har en alt for stor tank, som var virkelig besværlig at få ud og ind igen - men de stod tålmodigt og hjalp os hele vejen.
Faciliteterne var flotte, rene og meget velholdte. Hvis vi ikke skulle videre, var vi mere end gerne blevet her længere.
Alt i alt en rigtig dejlig oplevelse, og vi følte os virkelig godt taget imod. 5/5 stjerner herfra - vi kan virkelig anbefale stedet!

-oOo-

We had an amazing experience at this campsite! The staff was incredibly kind and helpful - they assisted us with planning trips and even helped us refill our gas tank. We had huge problems with it because the campervan we borrowed has an oversized tank that was very difficult to take out and put back in - but that patiently helped us all the way.
The facilities were nice, clean and very week maintained. If we didn’t have to drive on further north, we would have gladly stayed here longer.
Overall, we had a wonderful stay and felt truly welcomed. 5/5 stars from us - we can highly recommend this place!

Keith and Christine made us very welcome everyone on the site was helpful, it has a nice vibe showers and washing facilities very clean, swimming pool was lovely. Nice walk down to the beech. Locals very friendly
Campsite is very well kept. The bathrooms were the best we have seen on a campsite. Recommend!

1 night stopover, great price for the amenities! Didn't use the pool but the camp kitchen alone was worth it, plus free access to an on-site gym.

Person on the front desk was very welcoming and informative also. Would definitely stay again.

Super accueil !
Très bon camping au top !

Short walk to shopping centre and beach.
Gardens between good sized sites. Reasonable pricing. Clean, well maintained amenities. Very friendly staff.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We had a fantastic stay at Tropical Hibiscus Caravan Park! The new owners and managers are absolutely awesome – welcoming, friendly, and clearly dedicated to making the park better than ever. The sites are well laid out, and we had no problem at all getting in and set up with our larger rigs. Everything was clean, well looked after, and the atmosphere was spot on. We’ll definitely be staying again!

Did not use room. Stayed in our own caravan.there is no review option fr caravans. Great location close to beach & shopping. The new owners are very welcoming & interesting. Quiet park with very clean facilities & camp kitchen with a huge pool to enjoy. Pizzas cooked in the huge oven each week is a highlight. Thanks Keith &Christine, Looking forward to returning next year. R n R

Loved our 1 night stay, wish we had time to relax there for a few extra nights. The new owners Keith and Christine were the perfect hosts and was great to chat with them about their plans for the park. The amenities were spotless with instant hot showers. Pool and camp kitchen were spot on!! Handy to the beach and having an off leash area for our dogs was just the best. Supermarket, bottle shop and other shops super handy. We will definitely stay again when we pass through.

Lovely campsite filled with lovely people. Great location. Fantastic facilities. Gutted we didn’t stay on pizza oven days. Pool is great for swimming lengths. Camp kitchen had everything you needed including an air fryer! After scrubbing it we made the best chips in it! Would recommend!

Highly recommend if you’re looking for a spot to camp! We stayed at the unpowered site. Everyone is so nice and calm. Great service and great facilities including full kitchen, pool and gym! Loved it.
Great camp site. Nice facilities and even has a gym. Would recommend

Kleinschalig vakantiepark op 5 minuten lopen van het strand en woolsworth. Iedere maandag en woensdag stoken ze de buiten houtoven op en kan je je eigen gebrachte pizza of knoflookbrood meebrengen. Heel leuk idee en gelijk sociaal met andere camping gasten.

Washok was prima en douche heeft krachtige straal. Drogers en wasmachines zijn wel verouderd.

Camping is rustig en gezellig. Zwembad is klein maar prima.
Nice and central to everything, clean and tidy park and amenities, close to Woolies and a pharmacy. Thanks to the staff for your friendly and helpful service!
Great little caravan park,close to beach,great amenities , quiet,dog friendly

Wir hatten einen sehr netten Aufenthalt für einen sehr fairen Preis 65$ für ein Doppelzimmer mit aircon inklusive allem was man braucht. Auch nur 2 Gehminuten vom Bus und 4 vom Woolworths entfernt. Top.

I’ve been staying here for about 10 days with another three to go. I really cannot fault this place if you are looking for something quiet in the low season. The facilities are clean and my powered site is perfectly located. I have seen the amount of work that goes into the maintenance here and they are doing a bang on job! The only thing lacking is some shade in the pool area as it gets full sun most of the day. Owners and staff have been very obliging and helpful. I won’t hesitate to return again.

Een fijn en kleinschalig campingplaats. Wij verbleven er 1 nacht op een unpowered campingplaats. De faciliteiten waren goed en erg schoon. De eigenaresse was erg vriendelijk en gaf ons nog tips voor mooie watervallen voor onze reis. In deze omgeving kun je ook wilde cassowaries spotten. Wij hebben er hier 1 gezien.

Dirty! Lazy cleaners staff only care about what goes in the bank.

Pissed off stay elsewhere unless you don't care about cleanliness.
Ok Park. Reasonable rates

So disappointed. The owner is flat out rude. My kids couldn’t use the pool because it was closed off for his daughter’s wedding. That would be ok but why did I pay extra for my kids when they  can’t use the facilities. Do not stay here. Don’t waste your money.

It's a really good caravan park, I've been there 2 times. The unpowered site is 33$

It's really close to Woolworths and BWS (you can go by walk)

Amenties clean, a huge camp kitchen with a lot of appliances, (even the wood oven)

And the best part is the owner, she's really really kind and available.

I recommend this place.
Good bang for your buck! Really good facilities and friendly staff. Really enjoyed wood pizza ovens. Would definitely stay again!
Clean and helpful. Short was to Woolies and a great coffee shop called the Shack. You need to go to Mission Beach for shops and the Market.

팔순 엄니가 신혼살림 시작한
하꼬방을 여기서 경험해 볼 줄은...

캐러밴 파크계의 고시원

Nice quiet site close to the beach. Facilities were decently clean although the men's showers had a bit of a drain fly problem. No amenities nearby besides a couple of restaurants and a Woolies but okay for one night. Friendly staff provided plenty of info on the area when we arrived. Well equipped camp kitchen with lots of communal use items. TV room was nice to hang around in the evening.
Great location, with well appointed cabins and a very welcoming, helpful and friendly staff. We'll come back again!

Très bon camping, peu de place. Sanitaire et souche propre. Pour une nuit nous ne demandions pas mieux. Accès wifi un peu aléatoire. La femme qui nous a accueilli était très sympathique ! Moins de 15 minutes à pieds de la plage

Great little caravan park close to the beach and shops. The amenities are very clean and work well. The camp kitchen is excellent with modern gas burning stoves and BBQs. Highly recommended this park if staying in Misson Beach.
Vi sov inte ens här för det var så vidrigt. Videon säger sig själv.
Amazing and fabulous service
Vraiment pas chère pour piscine open 24/24 et une salle de gym. En plus y avait personne.

Beautiful little camping site surrended by trees own by a sweet family that have been running it for 30 years. Honestly the best one we've been through so far during 6 weeks and the cheapest! Very close from Mission beach centre town! Everything is perfect, nice and really clean. The swimming pool is beautiful, the amenities look new, the kitchen area is pretty big and you get everything needed, you can also find a living room with TV and loads of books and the super plus is the GYM, that makes the place even better!! We would have extended our stay if we could have. I highly recommend it! Thanks again from the French family!

Very tight spaces, we where given site 17, had no parking for car expect under berry trees, which stained  our car and van. not happy and it was the second  time we  had used our van know we have to  spend money to get the staines removed. Not happy at all!
Fair price against everything else going , shops close, beach 500mtrs

Our stay so far has been fabulous. The social events of pizza nights, happy hour and morning tea have made it a really welcoming environment. Staff have been super friendly and helpful. Location is great with walking distance to shops. Showers have been great with hot water and ample stall room/hooks/shelves. Great camp kitchen, pool and access to gym. Site size a little narrow but a minor issue. Thanks for the relaxing pleasant time
Friendly staff, nice common areas, bbq and good kitchen.
